== Notes for [[Item:Q82901|Q82901]] ==

'''Is she actually - Nutayla binte Janāb bin Kulayb Khizriji (From Banū Taym Allāh) or Janāb her Mother?'''

Source 1: Her Name was '''Nabeela''', and she is from the Descendants of [http://www.geni.com/people/an-Namer-bin-Qasit-bin-Hanab/6000000023060836384/ an-Namr bin Qasit bin Hanab]....["Nabeela from Walade An-Namr bin Qaasit; Zauja-e-Imaam Maulaana Abdul Muttalib]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3141834881EFBC189822EF79916C2551
geni:6000000002713859419

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
